programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Stone Pillow
programme.desc: Guest star Bradford Dillman plays Edison, a former private detective turned extortionist who is blackmailing a powerful crime chief with a roll of film linking him to murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Image
programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Committed
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Bag Woman
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Double Dead
programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Casino
programme.desc: Guest star Jack Cassidy is Orin Kerr, an ex-hoodlum who now controls the largest gambling resort in the western hemisphere as a front for the underworld crime syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trapped
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is struck on the head and loses his memory while trying to intercept an eight-million-dollar smuggling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Break!
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Two Thousand
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Leona
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underground
programme.desc: Phelps poses as a murderer to infiltrate a gang that specializes in spiriting wanted men out of the country after first brainwashing them to learn the whereabouts of their vast sums of money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Movie
programme.desc: Phelps poses as the head of a Hollywood movie studio as part of the IMF plan to prevent a crime syndicate's takeover of the studio.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Hit
programme.desc: Phelps poses as a government investigator who must work through a crooked district attorney to prove that a crime syndicate boss killed his girlfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Tilfellet Henry
programme.desc: Henry er en vellykket advokat som må vinne for enhver pris, selv på familiens bekostning. Men et pistolskudd setter en stopper for Henrys karriere, lammer ham og fjerner alle minner om livet han hadde før.

programme.title: Frøkens Kjæledegge
programme.desc: Clark Gable plays Jim Gannon, a school-of-hard-knocks newspaperman who despises journalism schools, until he sees who's doing the teaching.

programme.title: The Lunchbox
programme.desc: I Mumbais travle hverdag bringer en feil levert lunsj to meget forskjellige skjebner sammen. Den litt stillfarende enkemannen Saajan mottar ved en feil lunsjen som husmoren Ila har laget til sin mann. Det blir starten på et utrolig eventyr.

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love
programme.desc: Hva er merkeligere enn det store hullet som åpner seg i Lucy Sherringtons stuegulv. Kjærligheten, virker det som.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: En singel kvinne med fokus på karrieren i New York blir tvunget til å forholde seg til følgene av et mislykket forhold når ekskjæresten hennes hyrer inn hennes reklamebyrå.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Two lovers engage in a passionate but thwarted romance in this modern adaptation of the classic novel.

programme.title: Charming the Hearts of Men
programme.desc: Et romantisk drama under det politisk ladede tidlige 60-tallet, der en sofistikert kvinne vender tilbake til hjembyen i sør og oppdager at hennes muligheter er begrenset og diskriminering florerer.

programme.title: This Property Is Condemned
programme.desc: Robert Redford and Natalie Wood headline this sexually charged Depression-era drama. Redford plays Owen Legate, a railroad official come to backwater with pink slips for the yard employees.

programme.title: Benjamin
programme.desc: I Simon Amstells rørende, bittersøte komedie, blir en ung, fremadstormende filmskaper kastet inn i en emosjonell malstrøm av en spirende romanse og den kommende premieren på hans andre spillefilm.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One More Pallbearer
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot an Arrow into the Air
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately, they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.
programme.sub-title: I Shot an Arrow into the Air

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Invaders
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.
programme.sub-title: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nick of Time
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Obsolete Man
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Deaths-Head Revisited
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Kick the Can
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever
programme.desc: Tight-fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.
programme.sub-title: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.
programme.sub-title: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Prime Mover
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Self-Improvement of Salvadore Ross
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Rip Van Winkle Caper
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunt
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Static
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lateness of the Hour
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ring-A-Ding Girl
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: It Comes At Night
programme.desc: I et avsidesliggende hus lever Travis trygt med foreldrene, men han må håndtere frykt og paranoia når et ungt par søker tilflukt hos familien. Selv med de beste hensikter tar panikken overhånd når omverdenens skrekk og gru kommer stadig nærmere.

programme.title: Pay the Ghost
programme.desc: Ett år etter sønnens plutselige forsvinning under en halloween-parade begynner Mike Cole å føle sønnens tilstedeværelse på en skremmende måte. Sammen med sin ekskone avdekker Mike en rekke spor i jakten på sønnen.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw
programme.desc: I flere tiår hadde personer i den lille byen Newt i Texas forsvunnet uten et spor. Befolkningen hadde lenge mistenkt familien Sawyer, og da en ung jente klarte å flykte fra Sawyer-huset, var snart en hevngjerrig mobb på plass.

programme.title: A Cat in the Brain
programme.desc: En skrekkfilmregissør blir forfulgt av en gal psykiater og seriemorder som dreper ofrene sine etter mønster fra regissørens egne blodige filmscener.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ticker
programme.desc: Når blodforsyningen til Los Angeles blir hacket og ansett som ubrukelig, må Team Scorpion finne den skyldige og redde en ung jente som desperat trenger en hjertetransplantasjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe blir tatt til fange under et hemmelig oppdrag i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protégé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpions oppdrag for redde restene av falne marinesoldater i Vietnam er truet sammen med livet deres når en dødelig tornado kommer direkte mot dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Teamet blir hyret av forsvarsdepartementet for å bryte seg inn i Fort Knox og "stjele" en dyrebar gjenstand for å teste sikkerheten deres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Tsjernobyl for å reparere den forefallende atomreaktoren før en katastrofal nedsmelting, men må også redde Sylvester og Paige når de blir fanget inne.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må være smartere enn deres ustabile eks-Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, etter at han kidnapper Toby og truer med å drepe ham med mindre hans utspekulerte krav blir oppfylt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Teamet må finne en gutt fra Ralphs klasse som forsvinner på en ekskursjon etter å ha støtt på en dødelig forbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Team Scorpions enkle jobb ved Natural History Museum i Los Angeles blir dødelig når de oppdager tyver som raner en utstilling med sjeldne edelstener for å berike en atombombe.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Höga Kusten
programme.desc: Created thousands of years ago, the High Coast in the northern part of Sweden is the highest coast in the world. Tareq sets out to sample one of the most extreme types of Swedish food, fermented herring.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Satsning
programme.desc: Da FBI kalles inn for å etterforske et drap ved en pokerklubb i Los Angeles, avslører Don og agentene en komplisert korttellingsplan der en gruppe collegestudenter, hvis liv nå står i fare, er innblandet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Innhøsting
programme.desc: Etter å ha avdekket at en ung kvinnelig immigrant døde da hun solgte en av nyrene sine, må agentene stoppe et nettverk som selger organer.

programme.title: Numb3rs: På flukt
programme.desc: En naturfagsstudent ved Cal Sci blir mistenkt da en dyr maskin blir stjålet fra skolens DNA-lab.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Protest
programme.desc: En anti-krig-bombe som dreper en uskyldig mann blir en personlig affære da etterforskningen avdekker overraskende informasjon om fortiden til Don og Charlies far.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Psykologisk spill
programme.desc: Da en synsk mann fører myndighetene til et drapssted, prøver Charlie å bevise at det var en ren tilfeldighet. John Glover spiller Samuel Kraft, en synsk mann som leder letemannskapet til et åsted i villmarken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Alt er lov
programme.desc: Da en kvinnelig aktivist fra Irak blir drept på amerikansk jord, etterforsker FBI drapet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Mørk materie
programme.desc: Don og teamet etterforsker en skoleskyting, men blir overrasket av en av de mistenkte.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Våpen og roser
programme.desc: Don tar en nærmere titt på livet sitt etter at han etterforsker omstendighetene rundt en tidligere kjærestes dødsfall.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Berserk
programme.desc: Da en bevæpnet gjerningsperson stormer FBI-kontoret, havner Charlie i kryssilden mellom den mistenkte og FBI-agentene.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Retur
programme.desc: FBI etterforsker datasvindel, og det blir personlig for Don da den russiske mafiaen, som står bak svindelen, kommer etter ham og truer Charlie og Alan.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Understrøm
programme.desc: Don ber Charlie om hjelp da fem unge asiatiske jenter som blir funnet døde i vannkanten, mistenkes å ha fugleinfluensa.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Storkar
programme.desc: I avslutningen av sesong to må Don og teamet stoppe en mistenkt seriemorder som doper ned og dreper unge kvinner. JoBeth Williams spiller den avdødde Margaret Eppes, og Olympia Dukakis spiller Charlotte Yates, moren til en av de mistenkte.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team hunt down a 30-year-old teacher and her 17-year- old boyfriend who are on a crime spree from Indiana to Los Angeles, on part one of a two-part third season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Desperate to rescue their fellow agent, Don and his team close in on finding Megan, who is being held hostage by a disturbed teacher (Kim Dickens) on a vicious crime spree, on part two of the two-part season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must determine if a shooting on the freeway was a random act of violence or the work of a serial killer preying on the citizens of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a painting worth millions of dollars is stolen from a museum just before it is to go on tour, Don and his team must track down the thief, believing it is part of an insurance scam.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When an interpreter working for the Chinese consulate is killed in an apparent hit and run accident, Don and his team uncover an unlikely connection to the Department of Justice.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Don and his team investigate a murder at a horse track, they stumble onto more than just a plot of betting on fixed races. Aya Sumika ("The O.C.") begins her recurring role as agent Liz Warner, Don's former trainee.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a series of blackouts occur in power stations leaving Los Angeles in the dark, Don and his team must determine if it is an accident or the work of terrorists.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate the death of a minor league baseball player to determine if it was an accidental overdose of steroids or a homicide.

programme.title: Paris, Texas
programme.desc: Paris, Texas er antagelig Wim Wenders mest kjente, kritikerroste og suksessfulle film, belønnet med flere internasjonale priser inkludert Gullpalmen i Cannes i 1984. Filmen forteller historien om Travis, en mann fortapt i sitt eget private helvete.

programme.title: Ghost Town
programme.desc: En spirituell romantisk komedie, Ghost Town er historien om Bertram Pincus, en gretten tannlege på Manhattan som utvikler den uønskede evnen til å se døde folk.

programme.title: The Country Girl
programme.desc: Grace Kelly received an Oscar for her portrayal of the wife, and Bing Crosby played an alcoholic, has-been actor. When he is given an opportunity to star in a new musical show, his wife attempts to help him make a comeback.

programme.title: Øya I Himmelhavet
programme.desc: Filmen utspiller seg etter andre verdenskrig, og John Wayne spiller hovedrollen som Dooley, en tidligere militærpilot som flyr fraktfly og blir tvunget til å nødlande på en islagt innsjø fordi han går tom for drivstoff og flyet kommer ut av kurs.

programme.title: Frøkens Kjæledegge
programme.desc: Clark Gable plays Jim Gannon, a school-of-hard-knocks newspaperman who despises journalism schools, until he sees who's doing the teaching.

programme.title: Cold War
programme.desc: En lidenskapelig kjærlighetshistorie mellom to personer med forskjellig bakgrunn og temperament, på tross av at de er en dårlig match klarer de ikke å gi slipp på hverandre.

programme.title: 9½ Weeks
programme.desc: En kvinne blir oppvartet av en mann hun knapt kjenner. Forholdet blir stadig mer intenst ettersom de hengir seg til sine erotiske sengeleker. Erotisk kultfilm med Oscar-vinner Kim Basinger og Oscar-nominerte Mickey Rourke

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: En liten gruppe har gjort opprør mot Kopa Shuko. Da han oppdager at enbærer en halv medaljong om halsen, setter han inn alt på å få tak i den. For den som har begge delen av Double Dragon medaljogen får uovervinnelige krefter..

programme.title: The Hunter
programme.desc: En leiesoldat reiser til Tasmania for å finne den siste tasmanske tigeren, men lokalsamfunnets hemmeligheter kompliserer hans oppdrag.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Robin kommer tilbake til Cheers uten et rødt øre, men Rebecca er overbevist om at han har millioner.
programme.sub-title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad Bar

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carlas eksmann krasjer datterens bryllupsfeiring.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Når Frasier mottar et posttelegram fra Lilith, der hun ber om at han starter skilsmisseprosessen umiddelbart, gjør Cheers-gjengen alt de kan for å få han på godt humør.
programme.sub-title: Is There a Doctor in the Howe?

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier står plutselig i valget mellom to flotte kvinner.
programme.sub-title: The Bar Manager, the Shrink, His Wife and Her Lover

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier, Cliff, Woody og Norm har en katastrofal kveld på en drive-in-kino.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Etter et ydmykende pek, tar Sam og gjengen hevn på rivalbaren.
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars VII: The Naked Prey

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam blir låst ute av leiligheten sin og er på jakt etter et sted å bo.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier setter Woody på en stemmeseddel til et byrådsvalg.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla tar over som bartender når Woody får stillingen som byrådsmedlem.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca bruker sin kunnskap om klassisk musikk til å smiske for Kellys velstående far.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca skjemmer seg ut under Mr. Gaines' eksklusive fest.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Til tross for Rebeccas sans for rike menn, faller hun for en lokal rørlegger.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam får et uventet besøk av sin gamle flamme og Cheers-favoritt, Diane.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam og Diane forsones etter en uventet hendelse.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam og Diane blir plaget med tvil om å bli sammen igjen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Give Me a Ring Sometime
programme.desc: Diane Chambers gjør baren Cheers til sitt hjem når forloveden forlater henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Sam's Women
programme.desc: Diane kan ikke la være å håne Sam de mange flotte, men overfladiske damene han dater. Sam forsvarer smaken sin.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Tortelli Tort
programme.desc: Diane foreslår at Carla snakker med en psykolog for å lære å kontrollere temperamentet.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Sam at Eleven
programme.desc: Sams kompis, som er sportskommentator, vil at Sam skal være med på TV.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Coach's Daughter
programme.desc: "Coach" fraråder datteren sin å gifte seg med den pompøse og frekke forloveden.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Any Friend of Diane's
programme.desc: Etter en ødelagt romanse med en akademiker, bekjenner Dianes venninne, Rebecca, at hun nå vil ha noe mer jordnært. Til Dianes forferdelse sikter hun inn seg på Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Friends, Romans, and Accountants
programme.desc: Norm ber Diane være med som sjefenes date på firmaets årlige fest.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Truce or Consequences
programme.desc: Sam går inn som mekler i diskusjonen mellom Carla og Diane.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Coach Returns to Action
programme.desc: "Coach" føler at han ikke kan konkurrere med Sam når de faller for den samme kvinnen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Endless Slumper
programme.desc: Sam låner ut sin lykkecaps til en baseballspiller som er inne i en dårlig periode.

programme.title: Cheers NO: One for the Book
programme.desc: Beruset for første gang i sitt liv, gjør en engstelig, vordende prest et amorøst fremstøt mot Diane, og han konkluderer med at han ikke er egnet for noe kloster.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Spy Who Came In for a Cold One
programme.desc: Diane pådrar seg Sams og hele Cheers-gjengens vrede når hun avslører en kunde som sprer fengslende, store historier om sine bedrifter som spion under annen verdenskrig.
programme.sub-title: The Spy Who Came In for a Cold One

programme.title: Cheers NO: Now Pitching, Sam Malone
programme.desc: En skuespilleragent forfølger Sam, og tilbyr mer enn bare et forretningsforslag.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Let Me Count the Ways
programme.desc: Diane er lei seg fordi katten hennes døde. Hun får lite sympati fra gjengen på Cheers, og hun begynner å revurdere forholdet til dem alle. Spesielt Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Father Knows Last
programme.desc: Diane er forferdet når en svært gravid Carla lurer den overraskede, men ekstatiske Marshall Lipton til å tro at han er faren.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Boys in the Bar
programme.desc: Sam blir sjokkert da hans tidligere lagkamerat kommer ut av skapet.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane's Perfect Date
programme.desc: Uvitende leier Sam en tidligere morder til å gå med Diane på en dobbeldate.

programme.title: Cheers NO: No Contest
programme.desc: Sam melder Diane på den årlige Miss Boston Barmaid-konkurransen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Pick a Con...Any Con
programme.desc: Sam arrangerer et narrespill for å fange en uærlig pokerspiller.

programme.title: COPS: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: COPS: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: COPS: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: COPS: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: COPS: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: COPS: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: COPS: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: COPS: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: COPS: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: COPS: Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike when stopped and tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight out a road rage incident with rocks and a baseball bat.

programme.title: COPS: My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: COPS: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: COPS: Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit's help.

programme.title: COPS: Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant.

programme.title: COPS: And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight.

programme.title: COPS: Fight and Flight
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS: Who Let the Dogs Out?
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS: Dead Man Flushing
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS: Pistol Packin' Families
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS: Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Kill 'Em With Kindness
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS: The Fighting Kind
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS: Cell Phone Secrets
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS: Guns, Hash, and Fire Hydrants
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS: Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS: This Man Stabbed Me
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS: Cops We Run the Show
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS: Doggie Paddle
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: COPS: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school
programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.
programme.sub-title: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair
programme.desc: On June 30, 2014, in Nancy, the police are called to the home of Julie Martin, a 34-year-old nurse.
programme.sub-title: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)
programme.desc: The lifeless, mutilated body of a woman is found in the Rambouillet Forest.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murderous Lovers - Anne Bardot
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of 4 years old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair
programme.desc: On February 5, 2000, two hunters discover a charred body on the banks of the Oise.
programme.sub-title: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Émilie Godest Case
programme.desc: On November 9th 2007, around 11:30PM, aid arrives on the scene of an accident at the exit of Chateney-en-France.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle
programme.desc: On March 19th 1998, Akira Ojima, a 57 years old japanese architect, is found dead in the fridge of a villa in Nanterre.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 901
programme.desc: Melissa har gjennomført tre brystforstørrelsesoperasjoner, som gjør at hun må leve med store smerter og har blitt avhengig av morfin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Lenette har gått ned 55 kilo og føler at hun har for mye løs hud på magen, brystene og lårene. Hun finner derfor en kirurg, utfører alle de tre operasjonene, men det går ikke som planlagt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Vi møter Maria, som etter en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon fikk hull helt inn til implantatet og Casper, som har blitt mobbet for nesen sin hele livet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Etter et stort vekttap hadde Birgit store mengder overflødig hud på magen, og hun bestemte seg derfor for å få en hudreduksjon, men hun ble knapt utskrevet før hun visste at noe var galt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 201
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Michela som skammer seg så over brystene sine at hun gjemmer seg i store hettegensere, og føler seg nesten som en gutt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 102
programme.desc: Møt Christina som ikke fikk de struttende silikonbrystene hun alltid hadde drømt om. Møt også Nicole, som lever med smerter hver dag.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 906
programme.desc: Mia føler at hun etter flere operasjoner ser ut som en som har fire bryster. Magen til Alice blir større og større, og hun sliter med magesyre og smerter. Kan legene hjelpe dem?

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 403
programme.desc: Vi møter Charlotte, som skammer seg over silikonbrystene sine.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 807
programme.desc: I 2010 dro Tina til Thailand for å få byttet ut brystimplantatene sine, men operasjonen gikk ikke som forventet, og i dag sitter hun igjen med smerter som hemmer henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 507
programme.desc: For 10 år siden fikk Michelle fjernet en godartet cyste bak høyre øye. Operasjonen fører til at øyelokket henger løst over øyet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 607
programme.desc: For 10 år siden bestemte Lotte seg for å ta et øyenbrynsløft fordi hun trodde huden over øynene hennes hang og fikk henne til å se sliten ut. Men operasjonen etterlot noen stygge arr over øynene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 614
programme.desc: 24 år gamle Bettina har vært lei av nesen sin hele livet, noe som på skolen gav opphav til kallenavn som Pelikanen og H.C. Andersen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Diana, som etter en operasjon fikk bryster som var plassert på magen, og Dorthe, som føler seg forrådt av kirurgen sin etter en neseoperasjon som har gitt henne skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 511
programme.desc: Drømmen om en "vakrere" kropp blir ikke alltid som man håper.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Vi møter Connie som ønsket seg naturlige bryst, men som ble anbefalt av sin kirurg å sette inn de største implantatene. Britt sparte i fem år til en operasjon som gav henne skjeve bryst.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Etter to graviditeter sitter Majbritt igjen med to hengende bryster, og hun bestemte seg derfor for å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 509
programme.desc: Som 16-åring brakk Philip nesen i en slåsskamp og har siden den gang prøvd å få den fikset gjennom en rekke operasjoner i utlandet. Alle operasjonene har mislyktes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 310
programme.desc: Vi møter bodybuilderen Ulla som ønsket seg kvinnelige bryster, men som nå har så store implantater at hun har vanskelig for å trene. Patrik har fått fjernet hud på magen, men er misfornøyd.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 606
programme.desc: Claudia går ned 100 kilo og får deretter fjernet overflødig hud. For å avslutte reisen mot en kropp som Claudia kan føle seg stolt av, bestemte hun seg for å gjøre en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
