programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Prenups and Misdemeanors
programme.desc: Gjengen trenger GTL. Angelina trenger en særeie-advokat. Jenni og Nicole trenger en spade - for å grave opp beviset med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Unresolved Issues
programme.desc: Det er tid for utdrikningsfest og jentene drar til New Orleans for å feire Angelina. Men uløste problemer truer med å ødelegge hele greia.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Crash the Bachelorette
programme.desc: Jenni og Angelina renser luften. Og operasjon 'knus utdrikningslaget' får full effekt når Mike, Vinny og Pauly klekker en plan for å overta jentenes helg i New Orleans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Jenny står i spissen for Vinny. Er det en fugl, et fly eller The Designation?
programme.sub-title: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: P-WOWW
programme.desc: Angelinas utdrikningsfest er overtatt av gutta og begynner med strippeklubben og slutter med at Pauly og Jenny ligger i samme seng.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: So That Happened!
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelinas bryllup begynner. Mike avanserer og Pauly D og Jenni ville natt får samboerne til å stille mange spørsmål.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Rewriting History
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllup er like rundt hjørnet så gjengen feirer henne med en tur til Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: You Had Me At Um, Hello!
programme.desc: Den store dagen er endelig her! Jenni føler seg forhekset, Angelina velsignet og Mike litt oransje.
programme.sub-title: You Had Me At Um, Hello!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 1
programme.desc: Angelina og Chris gifter seg. Vinny protesterer og jentenes tale til bruden leder til buing i Staten Island-stil.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 2
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllupsfest blir kaotisk når Deena, Jenni og Nicole holder tale. Jentene blir forskrekket, Angelina raser og guttene prøver å gjøre det godt igjen. Men skaden er kanskje allerede gjort.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mediation
programme.desc: To dager etter Angelinas bryllup, er jentene helt på tuppa over talen som ble hørt verden rundt. Og Mike "The Situation" blir megler i håp om å føre familien sammen igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Taken Pauly
programme.desc: Midt oppi en global pandemi, fortsetter jentene med sosial distansering, men ikke på grunn av covid-19. Pauly er full av overraskelser når samboerne får vite at han ikke sitter i karantene alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Double Book
programme.desc: Desperate tider krever desperate tiltak og gutta er klare for en familieferie. R, S, V og P har en sniken overraskelse for å få jentene sammen igjen, men Deena har en egen overraskelse som kan komplisere alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single Ronnie
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelina kommer er i gang, og gutta må finne ut hvordan de skal presentere nyheten for Deena. Samtidig prøver gjengen å spille Kirsten giftekniv ved å lage et datingprogram til singel-Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Trouble Shot At Love
programme.desc: Datingprogram-ekspertene DJ Pauly D og Vinny Guadagnino er programledere. Seks jenter konkurrerer om den ultimate ungkarens kjærlighet, Ronnie Magro, i det splitter nye datingprogrammet "A trouble shot at love."

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jurrasic Angelina
programme.desc: Dobbeltbokingen blir full av følelser da Angelina slår ned i Las Vegas-sjøen. Deena blir på tuppa når hun kommer og Vinny dukker for slagene og The Situation blir overveldet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Text
programme.desc: 'The Situation' glemmer middagsplanene og deretter at han er i et tv-program. Og en sms hjemmefra ryster samboerne og truer med å blåse hele ferien i lufta.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Attack of the Killer Raccoons
programme.desc: Pauly kaver for å få Deena og Angelina ombord med en familiemiddag før Nikki kommer. Men en gjeng med vaskebjørner ødelegger nesten planen. Tilbake i Jersey, går Jenni glipp av noe viktig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Somebody's Wifey's In Town
programme.desc: Pauly tar med Nikki på en familiemiddag, og gjengen holder pusten når Deena og Angelina havner ansikt til ansikt for første gang på ti måneder. Men Vinnys bryske kommentar om bryllupstale kan få alt til å spore av.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Return of JWOWW
programme.desc: Angelina og Deena har begravd stridsøksene, og familieferien kan offisielt begynne. Men da Jenni kommer endrer det alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Note 2.0
programme.desc: JWOWW og Angelina setter p-en i pinlig under en familiemiddag. Etterpå er de i villrede, så Ronnie får en gjentjeneste av Dr. Drew. Kanskje han kan hjelpe til å forene familien igjen.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's stress level soars when his family experiences growing pains.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon blows the whistle on a classmate who threatens to shoot another student.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon dates a pregnant girl and a carpenter threatens to sue for an on-the-job injury.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie is overcome by jealousy when Lucy falls for his friend.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon's pursued by his friend's girl; Robbie and Lucy admit their feelings.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy and Robbie take a shot at dating and fail miserably on their first date.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary returns home and her siblings stage a protest against Annie's favoritism.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy and Mary duke it out when Robbie starts dating another girl.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie finds a connection to his girlfriend Joy's missing brother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon gets caught in the middle of a wild police chase.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy realize they need closure from their past breakups.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Ruthie protects a Muslim classmate who is harassed by classmates.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon gets drunk at a party while trying to fit in with the cool crowd.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary, Lucy, and Matt spend their Valentine's Day heartbroken and dateless.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's determined to get married and proposes to a Jewish girl on their first date.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt secretly elopes after one date with a girl from work, Sarah.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie and Eric have a disastrous Jewish dinner with Matt's "future" in-laws.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary returns to Buffalo to start a new career path as a flight attendant.

programme.title: The Young Master
programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Half a Loaf of Kung Fu
programme.desc: Jackie Chan spiller den unge klønete Jiang. Jiang vokste opp uten foreldre og til tross for at han verken har et akademisk hode eller de kampsportferdighetene han gjerne skulle hatt, klarer han å lure seg til steder og berømmelse han bare kunne drømme om.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: The Killer Meteors
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: Heart of Dragon NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Ted drømmer om å seile over verdenshavene, men må ta seg av sin funksjonsvarierte bror Danny. Men når Danny havner midt i et oppgjør mellom gjenger og gir Ted enda flere problemer, er begeret i ferd med å bli fullt.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.
programme.sub-title: What’s Love Got To Do With It?

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.
programme.sub-title: Take These Pills And Shove' Em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker yells at a woman for letting her child cry uncontrollably, then rants about her bad parenting skills.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is outraged as he tells the gang at the diner that someone broke into his apartment and stole his computer.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggies love life.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.
programme.sub-title: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.
programme.sub-title: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia
programme.desc: Monty’s journey sees him follow the path 33 SAS soldiers took after they were parachuted behind enemy lines to attack the enemy and create chaos to draw Nazi-fascist forces away from the front line.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 ble verden ført inn i atomalderen. Rollen hans som "Father of the Bomb" var satt , og Oppenheimer ble stadig mer bekymret for den potensielle faren denne vitenskapelige oppfinnelser kunne utgjøre for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler
programme.desc: In Hitler’s Germany, those with Jewish ancestry faced harsh Nuremberg Laws. Full Jews faced death; Mischlinge endured discrimination, job bans. Some, like Helmut Schmidt, unaware of heritage, found protectors like Milch in high places.
programme.sub-title: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: The German invasion of Russia from Operation Barbarossa on 22 June 1941 to Kursk on 5 July 1943.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls have to pose with different birds of prey and tensions there ends up being tension between some of the girls. Jasmine Guinness joins the judging panel to decide who will be eliminated this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go one-on-one interviews with The Wanted but for some girls the mistakes just keep coming. Fashion designer Henry Holland joins the judges at panel and it becomes time to rise and smize or become a catwalk casualty.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The seven remaining girls face another double elimination this week and find themselves being thrown in at the deep end. Katie Price joins the judges on the panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final five girls left in the running complete in a beauty shoot before preparing to fly off to Miami. In a dramatic turn of events one of the girls is left behind and her place in the contest becomes uncertain.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In Miami, the top four girls must try their hands at acting, before shaking their pompoms and becoming brides for the day

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: It's the penultimate week of the contest, and four girls remain. The quartet attend 'go sees' and complete the last photo shoot of the series. Who will make the final?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: From thousands of hopefuls, just two remain to battle it out on the catwalk. Who will Elle Macpherson crown as Britain & Ireland's Next Top Model?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: The show returns for an eighth series with 20 contestants all competing to impress judges Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford, Whitney Port and Julien Macdonald to win a contract with Models 1.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The remaining 17 contestants meet with the judges for one-on-one interviews and are scheduled to have a photo shoot with camels in the desert, but it gets canceled due to a sandstorm.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: The 13 contestants move into the model house and have a housewarming party, where they are visited by Cycle 7 winner Jade Thompson.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: The remaining 12 contestants receive makeovers at the Daniel Galvin salon and get their teeth whitened before being treated to a day out at a skating disco.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: The contestants go to the Hurlingham Academy and meet image consultant Vernon Francois for a challenge in which they decorate t-shirts and talk about their insecurities in a motivational speech for the school's students.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The contestants shoot a mock commercial for Alcatel, where they pretend to talk to their lover over the phone with a script written in French.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants meet TV presenter Laura Whitmore for a posing challenge in Carnaby Street under the pouring rain while passersby vote on their favorite contestants.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: The remaining contestants take on a catwalk challenge for TRESemmé, walking on a plexiglass runway covered in water. Lisa is chosen as the best performer, winning a year’s worth of TRESemmé products and hair services at the Daniel Galvin salon.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: The contestants meet journalist Gordon Smart and participate in a press challenge where they write a 60-second skit regarding their opinions of the other contestants, which they later present in front of the camera.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: Letitia, Lisa, and Roxanne receive a second set of makeovers. The contestants meet with Elle at Hyde Park, where they learn that the remaining five contestants will be traveling to Canada for the remainder of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The remaining five contestants fly to Toronto, where they take on the CN Tower's EdgeWalk before moving into their home at the SoHo Metropolitan Hotel.

programme.title: Dare, Dream, Dominate.: The Beginning
programme.desc: Begyndelsen. Mark O Madsen er stoppet som fighter – men kampen er langt fra slut. Sammen med Maria sætter han alt på spil i forsøget på at skabe Danmarks største MMA-show. Næsten allerede fra første skridt er udfordringerne overvældende.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Dave has a cold that has him acting like a baby, and Debbie's treating him like one; Rebecca and Joanna, however, think he's overreacting and are concerned he's going to ruin their spa weekend away

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam buys a boat without asking Andi, they wind up in couples therapy to settle the disagreement.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and he assumes the culprits are Don and Joe; after Andi makes Kate get a job at the mall, Kate decides she no longer wants to go to college.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business, their bickering reveals bigger issues in their relationship; Andi goes to great lengths to throw the perfect birthday party for Bev.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law Alice makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news.
programme.sub-title: Stuck In The Middle With You

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades, his unexpected reaction catches them off guard.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi attempt to spice up their social life by making new friends.
programme.sub-title: Adam and Andi See Other People

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam has trouble helping Katie prepare for her driving test; Don turns to Lowell for help romancing Marcy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to give Andi the perfect 20th wedding anniversary gift by re-creating their honeymoon.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Cooking show celebrity Hisama Hirano is invited to Kitchen Stadium to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen.
programme.sub-title: Sea Urchin: Battle to the Death

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: One of the fastest-rising chefs from Kyoto, the ancient capital of Japan, Chef Kenji Kaji is invited to battle with Iron Chef Michiba at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tonight's battle is a fierce tag-team event between the Cuomo brothers and Iron Chefs Sakai and Michiba. Who will come out as the champions in the Italian-inspired dual?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Female chef Yoshiko Takemasa is so fastidious that she only cooks fish caught by rods, not nets, to ensure no bruising.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Joel Bruant, an apprentice of the emperor of French cuisine, Paul Bocuse, hopes to once again defeat Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Minoru Noda has traveled all the way from Los Angeles to challenge Iron Chef Michiba in an ultimate Japanese battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga brings in Philippe Aubron, a French chef from Provence, to challenge Iron Chef Sakai in a heated crayfish battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Tsuguo Fujiwara, the managing director of the Chinese Chef's Association, takes on Iron Chef Chen in a battle of sea cucumber.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Sadaharu Nakajima takes on Iron Chef Sakai in a sticky battle of rice. Will Nakajima's rice salad with smoked salmon and melon win over Sakai's roast abalone and rice?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a night of tiebreakers when Japanese television star Kumbi Lin challenges Iron Chef Michiba. Who will reign supreme in this doubleheader? Part 1.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a night of tiebreakers when Japanese television star Kumbi Lin challenges Iron Chef Michiba. Who will reign supreme in this doubleheader? Part 2.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Witness as Masahiko Hagiwara takes on Iron Chef Chen in this battle of shrimp. Will Chen be able to beat Hagiwara? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Top chef Ikegawa Kiyotaka, who used to be a sumo wrestler, challenges Iron Chef Chen to a culinary battle that outperforms any sumo wrestling match you've ever seen!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Celebrating the 100th challenger at Kitchen Stadium, Chairman Kaga has chosen Challenger Toshiro Kandagawa who takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Bruno Menard is well-known for his 'sharp' dishes. Will he able to win this battle of escargot with Iron Chef Sakai?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen must fend off his own best friend as a challenger. Shozo Miyamoto serves up a Szechuan and Shanghai-cuisine battle to his old friend.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: From Arima Onsen comes the vice president of Japan Chef's Association, Challenger Tadamichi Ota. Will Iron Chef Sakai be able to capture a victory in this battle of octopus?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The head chef of the two-star restaurant L'Amphycles, Philippe Groult is determined to defeat Iron Chef Sakai in this oyster onslaught.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga pits two of his Iron Chefs against each other for the annual Mr. Iron Chef Tournament. Chen and Sakai go head-to-head for the chance to challenge the defending champion.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The heated battle between Chen and Sakai reveals Chen as the winner, who now has to go against the reigning Mr. Iron Chef, Michiba.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: This time, on Muscle Cars of Texas, Vinnie and the team are working on a 63 Z06, 59 Ford Pickup and a 69 Chevy Malibu.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Cuda 'Tat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Tom asks Dan to find him a rare 1967 Camaro Convertible with factory AC. But when Dan finds the Unicorn, the car is too good to cut up. Dave wants Dan to build a safe, all stock 1971 Datsun, but the car has been badly damaged by previous restoration work.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: FantomWorks epic 4 year long wrestling match with the 1961 International Harvester Metro concludes with an incredible, one-of-a-kind van. Ray wants his 1969 ZL1 to match the number 68 rally car, but he needs Dan’s rare Winters stamped 427 COPO motor.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie is working on replacing the gages on this 1975 Corvette. The rocker panels on the 1964 Corvette are ready to be reinstalled.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan's team take on the restorations of a 1966 Volkswagen Beetle and a 1976 TR6 convertible. The TR6 looks bad, but Dan sees hidden potential for it to become a rare 'survivor' car that still has its original paint and fixtures.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Daniel wants FantomWorks to swap out the V6 of his 1968 Mustang Convertible with the V8 from a donor car. Stacia and Eugenia need Dan’s help to transform their quirky 1962 Citroen 2CV from a ‘problem child’ to a reliable car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nikkos wants a spectacular 1968 Mustang Fastback resto-mod. The all-metal masterpiece catches the eye of someone who wants it at any cost. Jim and Arlene want to enjoy their 45th anniversary in the same 1969 Firebird they rode in on their wedding day.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mike wants Dan to make his prized Mach 1 even more of a muscle car. Richard brings FantomWorks the first ‘his and hers’ restoration – a Sunbeam Tiger and a Fiat Spider – but as Dan soon discovers; the challenges of the two cars are not equal.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Gray brings his 1929 Phaeton in, Dan uncovers deadly dangers that lead to lifesaving repairs. Tony believes his 1989 Jeep Wrangler is 95% done, but the car is a rolling disaster of bad work, tangled wires and incompatible parts.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ron and Valerie want Dan to restore their 1963 Jeep Willy’s Fleetvan, but the problems run deeper than the seams hidden beneath inches of filler. Grady’s Z28 breaks down so often that he’s never had it out of second gear.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are fresh off of winning some awards in Galveston, Texas. Moody Gardens Classic Car show is always a blast.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas are tackling the electrical of the 1966 Blue Mustang. The 1969 Chevelle Malibu is in the paint shop.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: David is a Volkswagen fanatic who wants a 1967 Beetle that can outmatch muscle cars. Robert wants a widened 1967 Corvette supercar, but first FantomWorks have to undo the bad repairs from at least three fiberglass rending accidents.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Joe challenges FantomWorks to build a replica of a legendary 1953 hydroplane that set a water speed record. Andy wants the perfect split window top for his 1963 corvette, but Dan finds hidden problems that launch a cross country search for parts.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nick challenges Dan to build a 1969 Camaro Pace Car that can beat the fastest Chevelle that FantomWorks has ever built. Pete’s Mustang Convertible was in three different shops, but it arrives with far more problems than anyone was expecting.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan and the team take on the restorations of a 1965 Mustang fastback and a 1951 Studebaker truck. The mustang is for a friend whose plans are far bigger than his budget, and the Studebaker needs a unique design to make it a world-class show vehicle.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dave traded for his dream 1957 Corvette more than three decades ago, but his plans to build it have so far come to nothing. Ken chose a rare 1954 Kaiser Darrin from his father’s collection and its now on FantomWorks to reverse the hands of time.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan’s brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.desc: Live coverage from a top-level snooker event on the International circuit.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.
programme.sub-title: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 1

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan enlists the aid of a gymnast to rehabilitate Deke. Meanwhile, Deke's parents have been deeply affected by the accident.
programme.sub-title: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 2

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A construction company tycoon now believes he's King Arthur, and his estranged son determines to have him declared incompetent. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Newlyweds strike it rich with the discovery of borax.
programme.sub-title: Green Is the Color of Gold

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An itinerant medicine man and his daughter find only tragedy when they attempt to sell their wares in Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When five men desert the Union Army, they are at the mercy of General Avery, who favors shooting them.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Steve Forrest guest stars as a gunfighter whose speed is legendary but who now is trying to live a quiet, nonviolent life with Teresa, the girl he loves.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hiding Behind a Star
programme.desc: Earp needs new deputies so Doc Holliday recommends his former brother-in-law for the job even though his sister-in-law hates Doc.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Earp Rides Shotgun
programme.desc: Earp is asked by Wells Fargo to ride shotgun to help catch the Purvis gang. Earp agrees but a grandmother complicates the situation when she refuses to wait for a later stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Bat is forced to hang Dal who he believes is innocent. Dal has been framed by the White Cap vigilantes and Earp wants to stop them.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Nineteen Notches on His Gun
programme.desc: The Dutch Henry gang is rustling cattle and killing ranch hands on some of the smaller ranches around town. Sheriff Bassett is sick so Earp and Bat decide to go undercover into the gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Let's Hang Curly Bill
programme.desc: Marshal Fred White tries to take the pistol from a drunk Curly Bill Brocius but White's actions cause the gun to fire and he is mortally wounded.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: With Matt out of town, Doc only has Chester to protect him when his life is threatened.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: So Long, Dora, So Long
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Brothers Join Up
programme.desc: After the death of Old Man Clanton, Doc Holliday hatches a scheme involving Wyatt's brothers to help him in his desire to create an internal fight among the Clanton gang members.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal
programme.desc: Earp takes the job of Dodge City Marshal. He arrives to find the Sheriff and his deputy under siege and the men on Front Street trying to kill him.
programme.sub-title: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt and Chester act as decoys to ambush outlaws that are masking their crimes as those of renegade Indians.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A dishonest gambler uses a mentally challenged man in a plot against Matt.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Requiem for Old Man Clanton
programme.desc: Wyatt tries to put a stop to ongoing border skirmishes between the Clanton gang and Mexican bandits.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Peter arrives in Sacramento to revive his family's fortune but learns Phineas Colby has monopolized the town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John is given the task of turning a small group of Apache men into a force that can aid the U.S. Calvary.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An outlaw holds up a stagecoach carrying a murderer to trial.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Farmer Carlo Farelli wants to marry beautiful saloon girl Della but must first deal with a town gangster.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Hole Up
programme.desc: Wells Fargo asks Earp to go undercover into the badlands to capture Blackie Saunders wanted for a robbery and murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Loyalty
programme.desc: Doc Holliday hits a long winning streak at the card tables and winds up with stock in a mine and railroad, both of which soon have a tremendous jump in value.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A notorious Apache is in the area and a local captain's son is missing.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Diamond Girl
programme.desc: Playboy-advokaten Denny ser aldri på sin kjedelige og lojale assistent Claire Bernard. Men når han oppdager at Claire er en uslipt diamant, bestemmer han seg for å forvandle henne til en fortryllende skjønnhet. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Sarah og Amy er bestevenner for livet og nå arrangerer de sin første kunstutstilling i en liten by i New England. Når en mystisk fremmed dukker opp, starter et mysterium med narkotika, CIA og Sarahs elskede onkel. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et spøkelse som var vitne til flere drap. I mellomtiden har Ariel en merkelig reaksjon på en oppgave i helsetimen.
programme.sub-title: Things to Do in Phoenix When You're Dead

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber med en 17 år gammel forbrytelse, viser Allison uvanlig oppførsel som kan være avgjørende for å løse saken, men som samtidig setter familien hennes i fare.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner under en motorvei uten å vite hvor hun er eller hvordan hun kom dit. Hennes mangel på hukommelse får henne til å begynne å tenke at hun kan ha drept noen med bilen sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bedt av Devalos om å hjelpe noen av vennene hans med å finne deres savnede datter, men møter motstridende bevis på hvem som er ansvarlig for hennes forsvinning.
programme.sub-title: A Taste of Her Own Medicine

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Flere urovekkende drømmer om en forestående apokalypse får Allison til å ta drastiske tiltak som forberedelse til sivilisasjonens undergang.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får nok en gang besøk av spøkelset til agent Cooper, som prøver å hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem den virkelige morderen er i en forvirrende sak.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har en drøm om et gameshow som kan avsløre løgner, og når hun våkner, hører hun en buzzer i hodet hver gang noen forteller henne en løgn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har mistanke om at en savnet kvinne kan være et offer for hennes merkelige barn. I mellomtiden dukker Joes søster Sarah opp uanmeldt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner fem år tilbake i tid etter at hun og Devalos blir skutt av en fremmed. Tidligere har Allisons drømmer fortalt henne at Devalos vil dømme en uskyldig mann for drap.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En mann ved navn Lucas Harvey forfølger Allison, overbevist om at han gjør Guds arbeid ved å kvitte seg med henne og hennes evner.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å bli plaget av Lucas Harvey, hennes besatte stalker. Harvey forstyrrer Allisons drømmer, noe som gjør henne lite hjelpsom for Devalos og Scanlon under en sak om en seriemorder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha falt i koma under en etterforskning, finner Allisons ånd veien inn i kroppen til en mann ved navn Todd Emory.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison henvender seg til Cynthia Keener (som nå er i fengsel) når hun begynner å drømme om et tidligere kidnappingsoffer som Cynthia en gang reddet.
programme.sub-title: The First Bite Is the Deepest

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens Allison takler Joes jobbflytting til San Diego, drømmer hun om og møter deretter en bankansatt ved navn Mrs. Boddicker som forutså et ran i banken hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når aspekter av Allisons drøm om å miste hele familien begynner å skje i virkeligheten, frykter hun at drømmen hennes kan gå i oppfyllelse.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og familien hennes må håndtere resultatene av hjerneoperasjonen hennes. Eieren av en lokal TV-stasjon ber også Devalos og Scanlon om å undersøke om sportsankeret hans blir forfulgt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret etter at Ariel begynner å vise merkelig oppførsel, og begynner å tenke at en myrdet stripper kan besitte henne.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allisons kreftrammede venn dør uventet, mistenker hun at en sykehusansatt kan ha skylden. Bridgette skriver en historie veldig nær det som senere skjer på Joes jobbintervju.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir forvirret når hun begynner å se visjoner om merkelige symboler. Når en seriemorder slår Phoenix, oppdager hun at symbolene kan være ledetråder for å fange morderen.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Quinn immediately takes action to stop the spread of a deadly epidemic.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Mike's stoic, disapproving Bostonian mother, Elizabeth, who, after years of estrangement, visits her daughter in Colorado Springs but finds her unconventional life on the frontier difficult to accept.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When a starving orphaned immigrant takes desperate measures to feed his siblings, the only thing standing between him and a noose is Kid Cole, the new sheriff.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren, the unforgiving father-in-law, threatens to take back Sully's homestead.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela worries when Charlotte's husband, Ethan Cooper, comes back to the family he abandoned, convincing almost everyone of his newfound ways.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When the town's water supply is tainted with mercury by a wealthy mining baron, many people become sick and Dr. Mike threatens the miner to clean it up or have his land taken away.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Doc Eli, a medicine-show man, arrives in town professing to have created the perfect bottled elixir, Mike sets out to call his bluff, especially when her children's health becomes jeopardized.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A wandering cowboy abandons his baby boy and leaves him in Dr. Mike's care.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Progress comes to Colorado Springs, and Sully pays the price.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Cheyenne medicine man Cloud Dancing is wounded by General Custer, who intends to hang him, Sully and Dr. Mike join forces to help him escape.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: As Dr. Mike's birthday approaches, the kids decide to do something about her unmarried status

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew and Michaela are at odds over his future when he sets out to prove to others -- and to himself -- that he's a grown man ready to take on life -- and decides to marry Ingrid.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Influenced by the pulp romance novels she loves, Colleen develops her first crush -- on Sully -- and schemes a way for him to rescue her from danger.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike faces the most difficult challenge of her career when she is forced to operate on Brian after he suffers a brain injury.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers Hank's dark secret -- an illegitimate son.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A famous civil war photographer realizes he may be taking his last picture after Dr. Mike discovers that he is going blind.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike breaks the rules to enter her new horse in an important race.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must prove that Loren’s sister-in-law did not murder her abusive husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: Lancelot
programme.desc: Kirbys helseproblemer fortsetter. Peter oppfordrer Fallon til å prøve kokain. Tracy saboterer Krystle på kontoret for å vinne Blake over på sin side. Veddeløpshesten Allegre blir stjålet.

programme.title: Dynasty: Seizure
programme.desc: Blake mottar et løsepengekrav for hesten. Peter kunngjør at han skal gifte seg med Fallon. Dex og Alexis blander forretninger med fonøyelser. Kirby får et anfall.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Girl
programme.desc: Blake blir mistenksom overfor Peter DeVilbis. Claudia mottar flere fioler fra «Lancelot». Adam forteller Blake sannheten om forgiftningen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident
programme.desc: Allegre leveres tilbake og Blakes mistanker om Peters innblanding forsterkes. Tracy iscenesetter en pressekampanje for å ødelegge Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vigil
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis blir tatt da han forsøker å rømme landet, og blir arrestert for narkotikabesittelse og fengslet. Blake får tilbud om å jobbe i politikken. Fallon gjenvinner bevisstheten og finner ut at hun er lam.

programme.title: Dynasty: Steps
programme.desc: Alexis prøver å bestikke Kirby for å hindre henne i å gifte seg med Adam. Claudia mottar en ny pakke fra sin avdøde ektemann. Fallon kan fortsatt ikke gå, før barnets liv er i fare.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 1
programme.desc: Krystle finner ut at hun er gravid. Fallon lider av smertefull hodepine. Claudia og Steven besøker Matthews ulykkessted i Peru.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 2
programme.desc: Alexis planlegger å forpurre Blakes forretningsavtale med Rashid Ahmed. Tracy prøver å forføre Blake og får sparken. Steven blir mistenksom overfor Dex, som foretar en mystisk oppringning til Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 3
programme.desc: Dex finner Alexis sammen med Rashid og vender seg til Tracy for trøst. Kirby finner ut årsaken til farens død og kjøper en pistol.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Birthday
programme.desc: Kirby får vite sannheten om farens selvmord. Krystle forteller en forbløffet Alexis om graviditeten. Fallon og Jeff kunngjør at de skal gifte seg på nytt.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Check
programme.desc: Blake reiser til Hongkong for å ordne opp i oljeforretningene i Kinahavet og finner ut at Ahmed har forlatt landet. Mark utpresser Alexis for $100 000, og McVane ser på mens han løser inn sjekken.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Engagement
programme.desc: Alexis forpurrer Blakes lånutsettelse. Sammy Jo ankommer Denver for å treffe sønnen. Mark og Alexis krangler, og Mark blir funnet død etter et fall fra balkongen hennes.

programme.title: Dynasty: New Lady In Town
programme.desc: Blake pantsetter herskapshuset for å skaffe penger. Tracy forteller Alexis om forholdet til Dex. Alexis blir avhørt om Marks dødsfall. Sammy Jo vil ha omsorgen for sønnen sin.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Nightmare
programme.desc: Kirbys forsøk på å drepe Alexis mislykkes, og Alexis lover å holde tett hvis Kirby forlater Adam. Sammy Jo avslører hvem som står bak Claudias mystiske oppringninger.

programme.title: Dynasty: Disappearance
programme.desc: Etter en alvorlig trafikkulykke forsvinner Fallon på mystisk vis. Dex og Steven får Alexis ut av fengsel mot kausjon. Sammy Jo prøver å forføre Adam.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Mortgage
programme.desc: Steven anklager Adam for å rotte seg sammen med Sammy Jo for å kidnappe Danny. Blake legger til rette for å pantsette herskapshuset.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon
programme.desc: Blake arrangerer et møte med Billy Waite, en forretningsmann med dårlig rykte, for å prøve å redde selskapet. Jeff fortsetter å lete etter Fallon.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rescue
programme.desc: I Seattle finner Jeff og Blake ut at kvinnen som døde i flystyrten sammen med Peter DeVilbis ikke kan identifiseres, men ringen hun hadde på seg er Fallons giftering.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig med på en Whiskeyresa och tågresa till Skottland

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard reser till storstaden London för att se vad den har att erbjuda. Följ med honom när han utforskar julmarknader, åker skridskor och besöker världsberömda platser.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Följ med Rickard på en resa till Rostock för den perfekta julekänslan.

programme.title: Nyfiken På

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Programmet leds av en av Sveriges allra mest rutinerade teveprofiler, Rickard Olsson. Han tar sig till platser, städer och områden som han är nyfiken på. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Det är dags för ett nytt avsnitt av reseprogrammet "Nyfiken På" med Rickard Olsson på afterworktv.se Denna gången åker vi till Italien för att följa med Rolf Flyg och Buss på en vinresa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Vi besöker Gardasjön i Italien och får en fantastisk cykeltur.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är Rickard Olsson i Berlin tillsammans med Scandorama och deras gruppresa. Tillsammans med gruppen åker han på dagsutflykter till historiska platser men får även uppleva det nya Berlins mest populära och trendiga områden.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här ger Rickard Olsson tips om saker du inte får missa när du er på Åland.

programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.
